data.body: [enwiki] Vegas Matt — ​Social media and "Vegas Matt" ​Morrow’s career as "Vegas Matt" began in late 2021 after his son, EJ Morrow, filmed him hitting a $78,000 video poker jackpot and posted the footage to TikTok. The video’s viral success led to the creation of the Vegas Matt YouTube channel, which focuses on high-stakes slot play and casino culture. As of April 2026, the channel has over 1.49 million subscribers and more than 1.2 billion total views.
data.title: Vegas Matt
